title: William H. Rogers
text: Home * People * William H. Rogers William H. (Bill) Rogers , was an American computer chess programmer from San Jose, California . After he retired from occupation, he has developed the native computer chess program Warlord [1] , written in Basic [2] . Forum Posts [ edit ] Chess in BASIC? by William H. Rogers , CCC , August 28, 1998 » Basic , Point Value Java Chess by William H. Rogers , CCC , April 12, 2007 » Java O88 chess by William H.
